mutation_checks.description: issue id must remain bound to issue 180
mutation_checks.label: issue_id_drift

mutation_checks.description: source surface version must not drift
mutation_checks.label: source_surface_version_drift

mutation_checks.description: total_steps must match ordered compact/source rows
mutation_checks.label: total_steps_drift

mutation_checks.description: compact root must match its canonical preimage
mutation_checks.label: compact_root_drift

mutation_checks.description: source root must match its canonical preimage
mutation_checks.label: source_root_drift

mutation_checks.description: source-emitted root must equal source root
mutation_checks.label: source_emitted_root_drift

mutation_checks.description: compact row ordering must be canonical
mutation_checks.label: compact_row_reordering

mutation_checks.description: source row ordering must be canonical
mutation_checks.label: source_row_reordering
